testcase.name: Patch Demo 1

failure.message: Patch.feature:14 - status code was: 401, expected: 200, response time: 1046, url: https://reqres.in/api/users/2, response: {"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/docs#authentication","hint":"Create a free key at app.reqres.in and send it as x-api-key.","example_curl":"curl -H \"x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY\" https://api.reqres.in/api/collections","_meta":{"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","cta":{"label":"Get a key","url":"https://app.reqres.in/api-keys"},"powered_by":"ReqRes","variant":"v1_a","context":"invalid_key","message":"API key invalid or revoked. Create a new key in API Keys.","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"error":"missing_api_key","message":"The x-api-key header is required for this endpoint.","next_steps":["Go to app.reqres.in/api-keys to get your key","Add header: x-api-key: <your_key>","For app user endpoints, use Authorization: Bearer <session_token> instead"]}

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://reqres.in/api' ............................................. passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ...................................... passed * header x-api-key = 'reqres-free-v1' ..................................... passed * def expectedOutput = read('response2.json') ............................. passed * def requestBody = read('request2.json') ................................. passed Given path '/users/2' ..................................................... passed And request {"name": "Carlos Rios", "job": "QA Leader"} ................... passed When method PATCH ......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.exception.KarateException: Patch.feature:14 - status code was: 401, expected: 200, response time: 1046, url: https://reqres.in/api/users/2, response: {"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/docs#authentication","hint":"Create a free key at app.reqres.in and send it as x-api-key.","example_curl":"curl -H \"x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY\" https://api.reqres.in/api/collections","_meta":{"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","cta":{"label":"Get a key","url":"https://app.reqres.in/api-keys"},"powered_by":"ReqRes","variant":"v1_a","context":"invalid_key","message":"API key invalid or revoked. Create a new key in API Keys.","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"error":"missing_api_key","message":"The x-api-key header is required for this endpoint.","next_steps":["Go to app.reqres.in/api-keys to get your key","Add header: x-api-key: <your_key>","For app user endpoints, use Authorization: Bearer <session_token> instead"]} at ✽.Then status 200 (Patch.feature:14)
And print response ........................................................ skipped

testcase.name: Patch Demo 2

failure.message: Patch.feature:22 - status code was: 401, expected: 200, response time: 697, url: https://reqres.in/api/users/2, response: {"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/docs#authentication","hint":"Create a free key at app.reqres.in and send it as x-api-key.","example_curl":"curl -H \"x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY\" https://api.reqres.in/api/collections","_meta":{"docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","cta":{"label":"Get a key","url":"https://app.reqres.in/api-keys"},"powered_by":"ReqRes","variant":"v1_a","context":"invalid_key","message":"API key invalid or revoked.
